  • Uses of OpenApiCustomizer in org.springdoc.core.customizers

    Subinterfaces of OpenApiCustomizer in org.springdoc.core.customizers
    Modifier and Type
    Interface
    Description
    interface 
    GlobalOpenApiCustomizer
    Implement and register a bean of type GlobalOpenApiCustomizer to customize Open api on default OpenAPI description and groups.
    Classes in org.springdoc.core.customizers that implement OpenApiCustomizer
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ActuatorOpenApiCustomizer
    Deprecated.
    as not anymore required, use your own GlobalOpenApiCustomizer instead

    The type Open api hateoas links customiser.

    OperationIdCustomizer
    The type Operation id customizer.
    class 
    SpecPropertiesCustomizer
    Allows externalizing strings in generated openapi schema via properties that follow conventional naming similar or identical to openapi schema
